mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT(xtsj,',',TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,xtsj,TIME)) AS xtsj,CONCAT(sbsj,',',TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,sbsj,TIME)) AS sbsj, id,sbid,snh,rjbbh,zdsc,dqsc,dy,kzt,mnzt,szzt,sbwd,sim,time FROM sj_sbzt WHERE 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and time between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and time BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59')
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
order by time desc

SELECT CONCAT(xtsj,',',TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,xtsj,TIME)) AS xtsj,CONCAT(sbsj,',',TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,sbsj,TIME)) AS sbsj, id,sbid,snh,rjbbh,zdsc,dqsc,dy,kzt,szzt,sbwd,sim,simqd,time,tahu,pressure,wind,rainfall,radiation,ultraviolet,illumination,noise,pm FROM sj_sbzt2 WHERE 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and time between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and time BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59')
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
order by time desc
